# OSV

<!-- Auto-generated by make generate. Do not edit manually. -->

Looks up package vulnerabilities in OSV and annotates matching packages.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Matcher name | `osv` |
| Runs by default | No |
| Requires enrichment | Yes |
| Uses network | Yes |
| Cache behavior | Uses Bomly's matcher cache; cache failures are warnings, not scan failures. |
| Output fields | vulnerability ID, severity, aliases, CVSS, fixed version, references, KEV signal |

## User Notes

Run with `--enrich` to query OSV. Combine `--enrich --audit` when you want OSV data evaluated by policy in the same run.
